description: Complete notification templates for KPRFlow Enterprise

notification_templates.name: Customer Registration Welcome
notification_templates.description: Welcome message for new customer registration

email.subject: Welcome to KPRFlow - Your Registration is Complete
email.body:
Dear {{customer_name}},

Welcome to KPRFlow Enterprise! Your registration has been successfully completed.

Registration Details:
- Customer ID: {{customer_id}}
- Registration Date: {{registration_date}}
- Assigned Agent: {{agent_name}}

Next Steps:
1. Complete your profile information
2. Upload required documents
3. Select your preferred property

For assistance, contact us at support@kprflow.com or call {{support_phone}}.

Best regards,
KPRFlow Team

sms.body: Welcome to KPRFlow! Your registration is complete. Customer ID: {{customer_id}}. Next: Complete profile & upload documents. Support: {{support_phone}}

notification_templates.name: Document Upload Reminder
notification_templates.description: Reminder for customers to upload required documents

email.subject: Action Required: Upload Your Documents - KPRFlow
email.body:
Dear {{customer_name}},

This is a reminder to upload your required documents for your KPR application.

Missing Documents:
{{missing_documents}}

How to Upload:
1. Log in to your KPRFlow account
2. Go to Document section
3. Upload clear photos/scans of each document
4. Wait for verification

Required Documents:
- KTP (Identity Card)
- KK (Family Card)
- Slip Gaji (Payslip)
- Rekening Koran (Bank Statement)
- Surat Nikah (Marriage Certificate, if applicable)

Upload Deadline: {{deadline_date}}

For assistance, contact your agent {{agent_name}} or call {{support_phone}}.

Best regards,
KPRFlow Team

sms.body: KPRFlow: Please upload your required documents by {{deadline_date}}. Missing: {{missing_documents_count}} docs. Login to upload. Support: {{support_phone}}

whatsapp.body:
📄 KPRFlow Document Reminder

Hi {{customer_name}},

Please upload your required documents by {{deadline_date}}.

📋 Missing: {{missing_documents_count}} documents
📅 Deadline: {{deadline_date}}

📱 Upload via your KPRFlow account or contact {{agent_name}} for help.

Support: {{support_phone}}

notification_templates.name: Bank Application Status Update
notification_templates.description: Status update for bank application progress

email.subject: Bank Application Status Update - {{bank_name}} - KPRFlow

sms.body: KPRFlow: Your {{bank_name}} application status is {{current_status}}. App ID: {{application_id}}. Next: {{next_steps}}. Support: {{support_phone}}

email.subject: Akad Scheduling Confirmation - KPRFlow

sms.body: KPRFlow: Akad scheduled! Date: {{akad_date}}, Time: {{akad_time}}, Location: {{akad_location}}. Bring required documents. Contact: {{contact_person}}

notification_templates.name: Payment Reminder
notification_templates.description: Payment reminder for down payments and installments

email.subject: Payment Reminder - KPRFlow

sms.body: KPRFlow: Payment reminder! {{payment_type}}: {{payment_amount}} due {{due_date}}. Property: {{property_name}}. Pay on time to avoid delays. Support: {{support_phone}}
